delegations.task_goal: Implement the session-bound manual authentication completion intent and fixture tests for Harbor #241.
read_scope: Harbor Runtime API session and identity-manager code
non_goals: cookies, credentials, verification codes, profile storage, DOM, or raw evidence
delegations.output_format: changed files, tests, head, status, and risks for main-controller readback
delegations.result: integrated and read back by the main controller

forbidden_targets: cookies, credentials, verification codes, profile storage, DOM, or raw evidence
ownership_constraints.shared_carrier_policy: The main controller exclusively owns the HARBOR-241 Loom carriers.

non_goals: cookies, credentials, verification codes, profile storage, DOM, or raw evidence

passed: focused Runtime API confirmation test (43 passed)
validation.observed_flake: Full pnpm test observed two concurrent local-provider timing failures; both isolated regressions passed.
validation.live_evidence: A local official-Chrome Xiaohongshu managed session was active and user controlled. Its supervisor-authorized confirmation was rejected because direct user session open/reuse did not mark it user-held; this correction addresses only that Harbor trust-state defect.

safety_boundary: User confirmation only; no Cookie, DOM, credential, profile storage, or external-site write access.
